=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Melbourne,Victoria,Australia
Melbourne International Music and Blues Festival
2002.02.08


complete, same fingerprints described for the other complete circulating recording
good sound



CD1

1 intro + Seeing The Real You At Last (Bob on piano), 2 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight (Bob on piano and harp), 3 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 4 You Ain't Goin' Nowhere (Bob on piano), 5 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 6 Drifter's Escape, 7 Just Like A Woman (Bob on piano and harp and Larry on slide guitar), 8 Lonesome Day Blues (Bob on piano), 9 One Too Many Mornings (acoustic), 10 Honest With Me (Bob on piano),

CD2

1 Saving Grace (Bob on piano), 2 Bye And Bye, 3 Summer Days (Bob on piano and guitar), 4 (encore), Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic), 5 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on electric guitar)



Concert # 1492 of The Never-Ending Tour. Second concert of the 2003 Tour Down Under. Second 2003 concert.
Second concert with the 15th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bill Burnette (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

9, 14 acoustic with the band.
1-11, 13 Bob Dylan (piano).
2  Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2, 7 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
10 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
